name: token-prediction
description: Estimate token usage from task context using tokenizer-aligned counts and baseline heuristics.

tokenPrediction.tokenizer.description: tiktoken encoding id; align with your billing model.

tokenPrediction.taskKind.description: Heuristic profile for output token multiplier.

tokenPrediction.includeHistoryTurns.description: Assumed extra user+assistant turns to add to the estimate (0 = single-shot).

tokenPrediction.logFilePath.description: JSONL log path. Empty = <workspace>/.cursor/token_prediction_log.jsonl. Relative paths are under the workspace folder.

tokenPrediction.showStatusBar.description: Show live heuristic in the status bar (Token Prediction: ~X万) from the active editor. Composer/chat input cannot be read by extensions — draft in a file or paste into an editor tab to preview.

tokenPrediction.workspaceScan.includeGlo.description: Glob for workspace.findFiles (relative to each workspace folder). Example: **/*.{ts,tsx,js}

tokenPrediction.workspaceScan.excludeGlo.description: Extra exclude globs merged with built-in excludes (node_modules, .git, dist, out, .cursor). Comma-separated, e.g. **/vendor/**,**/build/**

tokenPrediction.workspaceScan.maxFiles.description: Stop after this many files (enumeration + stat); output marks truncated if hit.

tokenPrediction.workspaceScan.outputRela.description: JSON summary path relative to each workspace folder root.

tokenPrediction.workspaceScan.samplePath.description: Include this many sample relative paths (posix) in the JSON for sanity checks.

tokenPrediction.workspaceScan.includeAbs.description: If true, include workspaceFolderAbsolutePath in JSON (avoid sharing the file if sensitive).

tokenPrediction.importGraph.maxFilesRead.description: Max code files to include when building the import graph (combined scan+graph command or offline script).

tokenPrediction.importGraph.maxBytesPerF.description: Skip parsing files larger than this many bytes.

tokenPrediction.importGraph.edgesCap.description: Stop after this many directed edges in the import graph.

tokenPrediction.importGraph.graphOutputR.description: Import graph JSON path relative to each workspace folder root.

tokenPrediction.importGraph.tokenizeNode.description: After building the import graph, read each node’s file from disk and tiktoken the source text (not just the path string): bounded bytes per file, up to N files → writes graph token budget JSON for workspace boost. Same tokenizer as tokenPrediction.tokenizer.

tokenPrediction.importGraph.tokenizeMaxN.description: Max source files to read for the token budget (one graph node id = one path; rest of nodes omitted from the sum).

tokenPrediction.importGraph.tokenizeMaxB.description: Per-file byte cap when reading graph nodes for tiktoken (truncates large files like the graph build step).

tokenPrediction.importGraph.graphTokenBu.description: Written on scan: totalTokens plus byFile[{id,tokens}] per graph node source file (tokenizationScope: file_contents). Use byFile to sum tokens for read/edit subsets.

enumDescriptions: Use tiktoken (cl100k/o200k) for input length and totals.
Use 0.3 tok per non-CJK char and 0.6 per CJK char for input length and totals.
Use tiktoken for totals; also show char heuristic in notes.
tokenPrediction.inputLengthModel.description: How to estimate input-side length for output heuristics.

tokenPrediction.llm.endpointPreset.description: Which host receives LLM scope requests. API key is stored via the command (Secret Storage), never in settings.

tokenPrediction.llm.apiUrl.description: Only when endpoint preset is Custom: full chat-completions URL (e.g. https://api.deepseek.com/v1/chat/completions).

tokenPrediction.llm.model.description: Model id for LLM scope (e.g. deepseek-chat for DeepSeek; gpt-4o-mini for OpenAI).

tokenPrediction.llm.lastScopeOutputRelat.description: Cache written after import-graph LLM scope (extraContextTokensGuess for workspace boost).

tokenPrediction.llm.clipboardLlmLastOutp.description: Cache written after Estimate (clipboard + LLM): thinking/difficulty merge and combined tokens (for your records; not used by status bar).

tokenPrediction.llm.thinkingTokensPerSec.description: If the model reports thinking time (seconds), multiply by this to estimate thinking token budget. 0 disables duration-based tokens.

tokenPrediction.llm.maxThinkingDurationS.description: Cap model-reported thinking duration (seconds) before converting to tokens.

tokenPrediction.llm.difficultyExtraToken.description: For questionDifficulty 1–5 from the LLM, add (difficulty − 1) × this many tokens to the combined extra-context estimate. 0 disables.

tokenPrediction.workspaceContextInEstima.description: If true, add an extra token budget when import graph and/or workspace scan JSON exists, or when last LLM scope cache has extraContextTokensGuess > 0. No files → same as before.

enumDescriptions: Ignore keyword signals (use settings taskKind only).
Use inferred taskKind from keywords/patterns when signals fire (still heuristic).
Keep settings taskKind for math; append inferred intent to estimate notes only.
tokenPrediction.keywordTaskKindMode.description: Local keyword/pattern classifier for output heuristics — no API.

enumDescriptions: Always use the built-in heuristic (tiktoken + task-kind multipliers).
Require a trained ONNX model (user path or bundled media/models/token_prediction.onnx); fall back to heuristic if missing or on error.
Use ONNX when a model file is available; otherwise heuristic.
tokenPrediction.predictionBackend.description: Base total estimate: offline-trained regressor (ONNX) or heuristic. Workspace / LLM boosts apply after this.

tokenPrediction.learnedModelPath.description: Optional path to token_prediction.onnx (absolute, or relative to the workspace folder). When set and the file exists, it overrides the bundled media/models default. Empty = try bundled model only.

scripts.test: npm run compile && node test/eval-smoke.cjs && node test/keyword-intent-smoke.cjs
